channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Economy Sees Growth Amid Policy Reforms and Technological Advancements
item.description: The article discusses the current state of the UK economy, highlighting recent growth trends driven by policy reforms and technological innovation. It examines how government initiatives, such as tax ...

item.title: Odisha Police Summon Ex-IAS Officer Over Disappearance of Key Inquiry Reports
item.description: The Odisha police have summoned former IAS officer V.K. Pandian for questioning regarding the alleged disappearance of two inquiry commission reports linked to the 2008 killing of Hindu leader Swami L...

item.title: Alphabet Shares Dip Amid Continued AI Investment Trends
item.description: The article discusses the recent decline in Alphabet's stock price, linking it to sustained high levels of investment in artificial intelligence. Analysts note that while tech giants like Alphabet con...

item.title: SARB Interest Rate Decision and Its Impact on South Africa's Property Market
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (SARB) is set to announce its July interest rate decision, which could significantly impact homeowners, buyers, and the property market. With inflation rising to 5% in J...

item.title: Federal Response to Wildfires Encircles Boston Bar, B.C.
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has established a cabinet-level emergency committee to coordinate the federal response to nearly 900 wildfires across Canada. The Incident Response Group (IRG) aims to synch...

item.title: Pakistan invites Samsung to expand local manufacturing and develop the country as a regional smartphone export and refurbishment hub
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has invited Samsung to establish Pakistan as a regional hub for the manufacturing, refurbishment, and export of mobile phones. The proposal was discussed during a meeting be...

item.title: APM Condemns Tinubu's Adviser For Disparaging Makinde's Political Profile
item.description: The Allied Peoples Movement (APM) has strongly criticized Tinubu's policy adviser, Daniel Bwala, for his remarks labeling Oyo Governor Seyi Makinde as inconsequential. APM's spokesperson, Abubakar Yus...

item.title: Prosecution's stance on defending VP Sara Duterte
item.description: The prosecution has expressed surprise at the possibility of defending Vice President Sara Duterte, amid ongoing legal proceedings involving her and other officials. The statement comes as part of a b...

item.title: GOP's Criminal Referral Against Jack Smith Dismissed as Meaningless
item.description: The House Judiciary Committee has referred former Special Counsel Jack Smith for criminal prosecution over alleged false statements during testimony, but legal analysts and lawmakers dismiss the refer...

item.title: Teen arrested after fast food receipt found in stolen vehicle
item.description: A 16-year-old male was arrested in Kitchener, Ontario, after a fast food receipt found in a stolen vehicle led to his identification. The incident occurred on July 22, 2026, when police recovered the ...

item.title: Flash floods and landslides kill 37 in KP, GB, and Punjab
item.description: Heavy monsoon rains and glacial melt have triggered severe flooding and landslides in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Gilgit-Baltistan, and Punjab, resulting in at least 37 fatalities. The disaster has caused wid...

item.title: Australia's Most Expensive Footballer After World Cup Success
item.description: The article discusses how a former World Cup hero has become the most expensive footballer in Australian history. Despite facing technical issues accessing the original content, the narrative highligh...

item.title: South Africa expands Small Claims Court jurisdiction to R30,000 to boost access to justice
item.description: The South African government has increased the monetary jurisdiction of Small Claims Courts from R20,000 to R30,000, aiming to enhance access to affordable and efficient justice. Deputy Minister Andri...

item.title: Sen. Kaine Challenges Pentagon's Budget Demands Amid Illegal Iran War
item.description: Sen. Tim Kaine (D-VA) criticized U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth's $67 billion budget request during an MS NOW segment, arguing that the Pentagon's financial claims are misleading. Kaine highli...

item.title: Trump Faces Backlash Over Iran War Among Core Supporters
item.description: The article discusses growing disillusionment among Donald Trump's core supporters regarding his Iran war policy. MS NOW's Jen Psaki highlights declining support for the conflict, citing a survey show...

item.title: Elderly man found dead following attack by his bulldog
item.description: An elderly man was discovered dead in his home following an attack by his bulldog, according to local authorities. The incident occurred in the early hours of the morning, with the dog reportedly rest...

item.title: 2030 World Cup Power Rankings: Key Teams and Predictions
item.description: The article provides an analysis of the potential contenders for the 2030 FIFA World Cup, focusing on teams like Spain, Portugal, Germany, and the United States. It highlights key players, tactical st...

item.title: Pakistan and Egypt Commit to Peaceful Resolution of Middle East Tensions
item.description: Pakistan and Egypt have jointly called for de-escalation and diplomatic solutions to address rising tensions in the Middle East. Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar and Egyptian Foreign Minister Badr Abde...

item.title: Mo Bimpe denies divorce rumors, threatens legal action against false claims about her children
item.description: Nollywood actress Mo Bimpe has strongly denied recent viral claims that her husband, actor Lateef Adedimeji, filed for divorce after a DNA test allegedly showed he is not the biological father of thei...

item.title: UK Airports Introduce Drop-Off Fees for Drivers
item.description: A new report has revealed that over three-quarters of UK airports have raised or introduced drop-off fees for drivers, with Gatwick and Stansted charging the highest rates at £10 for 10 minutes. The r...
